    索引

    常量字段值|所有程序包|所有类和接口|序列化表格

    A

    addJob(Job) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.dao.JobDao
     
    AdminJobServlet - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    Servlet that lets administrators create and update job postings.
    AdminJobServlet() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.AdminJobServlet
     
    AdminStudentListServlet - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    Servlet that loads the student list view for administrators.
    AdminStudentListServlet() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.AdminStudentListServlet
     
    AdminStudentListServlet.Student - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
     
    AiMatchEngine - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    Central service for AI-based student-to-job matching with simple file-backed caching.
    AiMatchEngine() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.AiMatchEngine
     
    AiMatchEngine.MatchResult - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    内部类：统一的返回结果结构
    Application() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.MyApplicationsServlet.Application
     
    APPLICATION_JSON_PATH_PROPERTY - 类中的静态变量 com.me.finaldesignproject.dao.ApplicationDao
     
    ApplicationDao - com.me.finaldesignproject.dao中的类
    Data access object for storing and updating job application records in applications.json.
    ApplicationDao() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.dao.ApplicationDao
     
    applicationId - 类中的变量 com.me.finaldesignproject.MyApplicationsServlet.Application
     
    ApplyCompanyServlet - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    Servlet that processes company application submissions.
    ApplyCompanyServlet() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.ApplyCompanyServlet
     
    applyDate - 类中的变量 com.me.finaldesignproject.MyApplicationsServlet.Application
     
    ApplyJobServlet - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    Servlet that submits a student job application and returns the outcome.
    ApplyJobServlet() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.ApplyJobServlet

    com.me.finaldesignproject - 程序包 com.me.finaldesignproject

    D

    decreasePosition(String) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.dao.JobDao
     
    deleteJob(String) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.dao.JobDao
     
    DeleteStudentServlet - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    Servlet that removes a student record.
    DeleteStudentServlet() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.DeleteStudentServlet
     
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.AdminStudentListServlet
    Loads the student records needed by the administrator student management page.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.ApplyJobServlet
    Validates the current student and target job, then saves a new application when allowed.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.DownloadResumeServlet
    Validates the requested resume and streams the stored file to the browser.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.GetAiScoreServlet
    Builds the student and job context, invokes the AI matcher, and returns the score as JSON.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.LogoutServlet
    Invalidates the current session and redirects the user to the login page.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.MOJobServlet
    Loads the jobs owned by the current module organizer and forwards them to the job management page.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.MOLogoutServlet
    Invalidates the current session and redirects the top window to the landing page.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.MyApplicationsServlet
    Loads the applications submitted by the current student and forwards them to the view.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentJobServlet
    Loads the jobs currently visible to students and forwards them to the job hall page.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentProfileApiServlet
    Returns the current student's profile as JSON.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentProfileServlet
    Resolves the target profile and forwards the populated data to view_profile.jsp.
    doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.UpdateApplicationServlet
    Updates the selected application status and returns the result to the caller.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.AdminJobServlet
    Processes administrator job creation and update requests.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.ApplyCompanyServlet
    Processes the company-side application submission workflow.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.DeleteStudentServlet
    Deletes the selected student record and redirects back to the management page.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.LoginServlet
    Authenticates the submitted credentials, initializes the session, and redirects to the role-specific landing page.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.LogoutServlet
    Delegates logout requests submitted with POST to the GET handler.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.MOAiMatchServlet
    Evaluates applicants for the selected job and returns ranked AI matching results.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.MOJobServlet
    Processes module organizer job creation and update requests.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.MOLogoutServlet
    Delegates POST logout requests to MOLogoutServlet.doGet(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse).
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.MORegisterServlet
    Validates the submitted module organizer data and creates the new account when possible.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentJobServlet
    Handles student job page actions that are submitted with POST.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentProfileApiServlet
    Delegates first-time profile submissions to the shared save logic.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentRegisterServlet
    Validates the submitted student registration data and creates the new account when possible.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentResumeUploadServlet
    Validates the uploaded resume, stores it on disk, and updates the related student profile.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.UpdateCompanyServlet
    Processes the submitted company changes and saves the updated company record.
    doPost(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.UpdateStudentServlet
    Processes the submitted student changes and saves the updated student record.
    doPut(HttpServletRequest, HttpServletResponse) - 类中的方法 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentProfileApiServlet
    Delegates profile updates to the shared save logic.
    DownloadResumeServlet - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    Servlet that streams an uploaded student resume to the client.
    DownloadResumeServlet() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.DownloadResumeServlet

    StudentJobServlet - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    学生职位列表 Servlet 负责展示系统中所有发布的职位，供学生（TA 申请者）查看和筛选
    StudentJobServlet() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentJobServlet
     
    StudentProfile - com.me.finaldesignproject.model中的类
    Serializable student profile model that stores academic, contact, and resume details.
    StudentProfile() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.model.StudentProfile
     
    StudentProfileApiServlet - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    REST-style servlet for reading and saving the logged-in student's profile data.
    StudentProfileApiServlet() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.StudentProfileApiServlet
     
    StudentProfileDao - com.me.finaldesignproject.dao中的类
    Data access object for student profile records stored in student_profiles.json.
    StudentProfileDao() - 类的构造器 com.me.finaldesignproject.dao.StudentProfileDao
     
    StudentProfileServlet - com.me.finaldesignproject中的类
    Servlet that loads the profile page for either the current student or a selected student record.
